!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (4) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2304 file.tsx:12:13: Cannot find name 'div'.
!!! related TS2304 file.tsx:12:24: Cannot find name 'div'.
!!! related TS2304 file.tsx:23:10: Cannot find name 'div'.
!!! related TS2304 file.tsx:23:25: Cannot find name 'div'.
==== file.tsx (0 errors) ====
    /// <reference path="/.lib/react.d.ts" />
    
    import React = require('react');
    
    interface Prop {
        a: number,
        b: string,
        children: string | JSX.Element
    }
    
    function Comp(p: Prop) {
        return <div>{p.b}</div>;
    }
    
    // OK
    let k = <Comp a={10} b="hi" children ="lol" />;
    let k1 =
        <Comp a={10} b="hi">
            hi hi hi!
        </Comp>;
    let k2 =
        <Comp a={10} b="hi">
            <div>hi hi hi!</div>
        </Comp>;
